routes.name: skill-creation-maintenance
routes.scenario: Create or modify a Codex skill package
trigger_conditions: The user asks to create a new skill
The user asks to change behavior or routing rules for an existing skill
skip_conditions: The user only asks a factual question about what a skill does

chain.reason: Clarify trigger conditions, boundaries, storage, and user confirmation before changing behavior
Turn the approved spec into a task-by-task implementation plan
Verify helper scripts, schemas, and package structure after implementation

routes.reason: Skill behavior is durable and easy to overfit, so design and plan steps reduce bad long-term rules.
risks: Skipping design can create a skill that routes too aggressively
Writing rules without confirmation can make future sessions confusing
